projects.name: Trashure Hunters — MVP
projects.daveAction: Regenerate the Anthropic API key + add Firebase credentials
projects.daveInstructions: The exposed key must be rotated (security) and Firebase keys added so login works. Paste both into the project env, then ping me to redeploy.
projects.revisionPrompt: Update Trashure Hunters MVP: [describe the change, e.g. tweak the onboarding flow]. Keep it premium and strictly on 3S Design System tokens (no hardcoded colors), WCAG AA, mobile + desktop, and the established game look. Never fabricate the 3Shamrocks logo. Re-deploy and confirm the live URL returns 200.

projects.name: Trashure Hunters — Website
projects.daveInstructions: Point the domain's DNS to GitHub Pages and add it under repo Settings → Pages → Custom domain. Send me the domain and I'll verify the CNAME + HTTPS.
projects.revisionPrompt: Update the Trashure Hunters website: [describe the change, e.g. refresh the hero copy]. Keep it premium and strictly on 3S Design System tokens (no hardcoded colors), WCAG AA, mobile + desktop. Never fabricate the 3Shamrocks logo. Re-deploy and confirm the live URL returns 200.

projects.name: Trashure Hunters — Movie
projects.daveInstructions: Read the current draft and approve, or note the scenes to revise. Once approved I lock scope and move to storyboards.
projects.revisionPrompt: Revise the Trashure Hunters screenplay: [describe the change, e.g. tighten Act 2]. Keep the established tone and characters, professional formatting, and the studio's premium standard. Summarize what changed and flag anything that affects production scope.

projects.name: Shomer
projects.daveInstructions: Open the preview and pick the direction you want to keep. Reply with what works and what to change and I'll refine.
projects.revisionPrompt: Update Shomer: [describe the change, e.g. simplify the alert screen]. Keep it premium and strictly on 3S Design System tokens (no hardcoded colors), WCAG AA, mobile + desktop, built on the real logo. Never fabricate the 3Shamrocks logo. Re-deploy and confirm the live URL returns 200.

projects.name: Ezra — Senior Helper
projects.daveAction: Judge the rebuild + provide a Grok key
projects.daveInstructions: Review the rebuilt direction, and add xAI billing so the Grok key works. Paste the key to me and I'll wire it in.
projects.revisionPrompt: Update Ezra (Senior Helper): [describe the change, e.g. enlarge tap targets]. Keep it premium and strictly on 3S Design System tokens (no hardcoded colors), WCAG AA, mobile + desktop, with senior-friendly legibility. Never fabricate the 3Shamrocks logo. Re-deploy and confirm the live URL returns 200.

projects.name: IG Mascot Network
projects.status: Goes LIVE today if accounts are set
projects.daveAction: Create the Instagram accounts + connect the scheduler
projects.daveInstructions: Create the mascot IG accounts and connect them to the scheduler. The moment they exist, content publishing turns on — this is the income engine.
projects.revisionPrompt: Update the IG Mascot Network hub: [describe the change, e.g. add a new mascot card]. Keep it premium and strictly on 3S Design System tokens (no hardcoded colors), WCAG AA, mobile + desktop. Never fabricate the 3Shamrocks logo. Re-deploy and confirm the live URL returns 200.

projects.name: Chore Wars
projects.daveInstructions: Click through the core flow on your phone and note anything broken. No rush — it's already live.
projects.revisionPrompt: Update Chore Wars: [describe the change, e.g. fix the points tally]. Keep it premium and strictly on 3S Design System tokens (no hardcoded colors), WCAG AA, mobile + desktop. Never fabricate the 3Shamrocks logo. Re-deploy and confirm the live URL returns 200.

projects.name: 3S Design System + Grok
projects.daveAction: Add xAI billing so the Grok image pipeline works
projects.daveInstructions: The Grok key is valid but image generation is blocked until billing is added at xAI. Add credits and the asset pipeline unblocks.
projects.revisionPrompt: Update the 3S Design System: [describe the change, e.g. add a new component]. Change tokens at the right layer (0 primitives / 1 brand / 2 semantic), keep light + dark and WCAG AA, and don't break existing brands. Never fabricate the 3Shamrocks logo. Re-deploy and confirm the live URL returns 200.
